## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, strategy, and next steps for GrowthX's content marketing engagement with StackBlitz.](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary goal is driving paying subscribers through programmatic content creation (1200 pieces/year)](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [StackBlitz needs to select and implement a headless CMS (Strapi or Sanity recommended)](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Focus on non-technical/semi-technical audience building AI-powered apps/websites](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Will start with "how-to" content before exploring competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Topics

### Project Goals & KPIs

  - [Main goal: Drive paying subscribers through content](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [KPIs still being defined internally at StackBlitz](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Potential to measure LTV and conversion rates at 30/60/90 days](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Target audience: Non-technical to semi-technical users (e.g. Wix/Squarespace users)](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [StackBlitz among first "text-to-app" tools after GPT-3.5 release](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Key competitors: Lovable, Replit, V0](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Large tech incumbents (e.g. Firebase AI) recently entering space](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Product differentiation challenging as capabilities converge](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [StackBlitz's web container tech a key differentiator, but technical/less marketable](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### Content Strategy & Workflow

  - [GrowthX to create programmatic content, StackBlitz to handle editorial](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Will start with calibration articles to nail tone/voice](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Exploring "how-to" content (e.g. building industry-specific apps)](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Cautious approach to competitor comparisons/mentions](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2375.0)
  - [Potential to create prompt templates for finance, CRMs, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2597.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [StackBlitz needs to implement a headless CMS (Strapi or Sanity recommended)](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [GrowthX can advise on CMS architecture and SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Options for content delivery: CSV/XML feed or direct CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide wireframes to visualize content structure needs](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

### Additional Opportunities

  - [Support upcoming hackathon with project showcase pages](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
  - [Explore early access program (EAP) content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2933.0)
  - [Potential to amplify other marketing initiatives (influencers, paid ads)](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)

## Next Steps

  - [StackBlitz to select and begin implementing a headless CMS](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content strategy and topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review strategy and calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [StackBlitz to provide additional brand voice/tone guidance](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up workflows and inventory tracking in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/1SHA9XD8hyNQv-y2YqzXUon5Fyzh72xR?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
